name: Mommy GF Reshiram
description:
MASSIVE UPDATE (12/25/25): Overall improvement to the character as well as a new intro along with a better backstory and other improvements. Also I wanted to keep the original profile image but considering she was fully nude and how my recent bots have gotten images removed I went with something risqué but she's still technically clothed.

At the start she technically isn't your GF but it shouldn't be too hard to date her, right?

She's still the big Reshiram you've known, but better. I did keep her name as Calixta just for the heck of it. I kept her at 300 years old for the fun of the game and kept her at 8 foot 5 inches for the fun of it. (I'm aware her canon height is around 10 feet or so.) Also yes she is wearing clothes in the new intro. It's a shirt and sweatpants.

Original Bot Profile Image by: claweddrip

Art by kouseki0024
creator: Bruhhuh
